hero.description: The smart alternative for managing Aave v3 lending positions. Swap debt with 0% execution fees and save up to 67% on collateral swaps compared to the official interface.

howItWorks.title: Built for simplicity
howItWorks.subtitle: No deposits, no migration. Just connect and optimize.

connect.title: 1. Connect Wallet
connect.desc: Instantly load your active lending positions without any deposits or migrations.

review.title: 2. Review Portfolio
review.desc: Track your net worth, health factor, and cross-chain metrics in one unified view.

execute.title: 3. Execute Swaps
execute.desc: Repay debt or swap collateral securely taking advantage of optimized routes.

dashboard.title: Swap-Focused Management
dashboard.description: Track your multi-chain net worth and execute lightning-fast debt and collateral swaps across all major markets from a single interface.

efficiency.title: Maximize Your Yield
efficiency.desc1: A simple, straight-to-the-point interface focused on optimizing your lending position swaps without extra fees. Our architecture is lean by design so you save as much as possible.
efficiency.desc2: Only pay network gas, no added adapter fees for debt switching. Execute pure 0% fee debt swaps directly via our dashboard.

directAccess.title: Direct Protocol Access
directAccess.desc: Interact directly with the protocol's underlying smart contracts. No middleman, no delay, just clean and efficient execution.

lowCost.title: Low-Cost Collateral Swaps
lowCost.desc: Feature under development that will offer fees up to 67% cheaper compared to conventional adapters throughout your collateral management.

comparison.title: Why Choose LilSwap?
comparison.subtitle: See how we stack up against the official interface.

efficiency.title: Maximized Economy
efficiency.subtitle: Stop overpaying on transaction costs. LilSwap optimizes your route to ensure you keep more of your hard-earned yield.

collat.title: Save up to 67% on every collateral move
collat.desc: Drastically reduce swap fees compared to standard aggregator routes. Never pay 0.25% protocol + 0.05% execution fees again.

debt.title: Pay $0 in protocol fees for debt switching
debt.desc: Adapters charge a ~0.05% execution fee just to use them. We charge purely 0% execution fees for direct debt repayments and switches.

calculator.title: Savings Calculator
calculator.disclaimer: *Network gas fees apply in all cases.

roadmap.title: Product Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Our vision for the future of LilSwap protocol development.

phase1.title: Phase 1
phase1.subtitle: Debt Swaps & Efficiency
phase1.desc: Main focus on 0% execution fee debt swaps. Currently available on the most popular V3 markets: Ethereum, Base, BNB, Polygon, and Arbitrum.

phase2.title: Phase 2
phase2.subtitle: Collateral Swaps & Expansion
phase2.desc: Implementation of collateral swaps with up to 67% lower fees. Expansion to more chains and integration of new assets for comprehensive management.

phase3.title: Phase 3
phase3.subtitle: MEV Protection (CoW Protocol)
phase3.desc: Full integration with CoW Protocol for MEV-protected trades. Get the best prices with protection against front-running and sandwich attacks.

q1.title: Is LilSwap a separate lending protocol?
q1.desc: No, LilSwap is simply an alternative, cost-efficient interface. You are interacting directly with Aave V3 smart contracts, just doing so through a highly optimized execution layer.

q2.title: Why are your fees lower than the official interface?
q2.desc: In DeFi, execution fees (like the standard ~0.05% for debt swaps) are often treated as the 'norm' and can even be omitted by interfaces that claim to be fee-free. At LilSwap, we challenge this standard. Our fees are lower—and 0% for debt swaps—simply because we choose not to charge service fees where others hide them. We believe the value should stay with the user, providing total transparency on your real costs.

q3.title: Do I need to migrate my positions to LilSwap?
q3.desc: Not at all. There is no 'migration' or deposit needed. Since LilSwap operates as a direct interface for the Aave V3 protocol, your existing positions will show up automatically the moment you connect your wallet. You can start optimizing your debt and collateral instantly without moving a single cent.

q4.title: Is LilSwap a general-purpose token aggregator?
q4.desc: No. While standard aggregators are designed for swapping any tokens in your wallet, LilSwap is a specialized tool built exclusively for Aave V3 positions. We focus solely on converting debt and collateral within the protocol, providing highly optimized execution paths that general-purpose aggregators simply aren't designed to handle.

cta.title: Ready to optimize your yield?
cta.subtitle: Start managing your lending positions with optimized execution fees and maximum efficiency.

footer.tagline: The ultimate interface for DeFi power users.
